task_completion.description: Verify that the 'User documentation' category has been renamed to 'User Manuals'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Document Categories list (usually under Administration -> Enumerations), 'User Manuals' is visible and 'User documentation' is absent.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Test Plans' category has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Test Plans' is visible in the Document Categories list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Audit Reports' category has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Audit Reports' is visible in the Document Categories list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Technical documentation' category has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Technical documentation' is no longer visible in the Document Categories list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Legacy System Spec' document in the 'ISO 13485 Prep' project is now categorized under 'Test Plans'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Documents section of the 'ISO 13485 Prep' project, the document 'Legacy System Spec' is displayed with the category 'Test Plans', OR a screenshot shows the successful reassignment dropdown/prompt selecting 'Test Plans' during the deletion of the old category.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Redmine web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Redmine application, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open and used to modify the DOM text to simulate task completion.

integrity.description: Verify the changes reflect genuine application state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success flashes/notifications in Redmine (e.g., 'Successful update') should be visible, and the URL should correspond to the correct Redmine administration or project pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 'ISO 13485 Prep'. Target Document: 'Legacy System Spec'. The category 'Technical documentation' must be deleted. The category 'User documentation' must be renamed to 'User Manuals'. New categories 'Test Plans' and 'Audit Reports' must be created. The 'Legacy System Spec' document must be reassigned to the 'Test Plans' category.
